question: What are the ids and names of the battles that led to more than 10 people killed in total.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.id ,  T1.name FROM battle AS T1 JOIN ship AS T2 ON T1.id  =  T2.lost_in_battle JOIN death AS T3 ON T2.id  =  T3.caused_by_ship_id GROUP BY T1.id HAVING sum(T3.killed)  >  10
predicted_sql: SELECT col_1, col_2 FROM battle JOIN ship ON battle.col_1 = ship.col_1 JOIN death ON ship.col_2 = death.col_1 GROUP BY battle.col_1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
raw_response: SELECT col_1, col_2 FROM battle JOIN ship ON battle.col_1 = ship.col_1 JOIN death ON ship.col_2 = death.col_1 GROUP BY battle.col_1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
